# v2.0.7

## Changes

- Added GitLab project name and namespace path to merge request webhook logs.
- Updated merge request event ignored wording to clarify that only manual MR note triggers are supported.
- Updated ignored webhook response reason from `merge_request_events_disabled` to `merge_request_events_manual_triggers_only`.

## Assets

- Windows x86_64: `gitlab-work-runner-v2.0.7-windows-x86_64.zip`
- Ubuntu x86_64: `gitlab-work-runner-v2.0.7-linux-x86_64.tar.gz`
